name: Yash Gohil
bio: Yash is the top-ranked Consulting mentor from IIM Ahmedabad, voted #1 by 250+ students. Currently at Accenture Strategy — specialises in structured case-solving, market entry, and PI prep for consulting roles.

name: Shen Shaji
bio: Shen is the top-ranked Product Management mentor from IIM Bangalore, voted #1 by 250+ students. At Media.net — expert in PM interviews, product sense, metrics, and behavioural rounds.

name: Vidhi Barolia
bio: Vidhi is the top-ranked Finance mentor from IIM Lucknow, voted #1 by 250+ students. Currently at PwC US — covers valuation, financial modeling, DCF, and BFSI placement interview prep.

name: Aadesh Gupta
bio: Aadesh is the top-ranked Marketing mentor from IIM Mumbai, voted #1 by 250+ students. At L'Oréal — expert in 4P frameworks, brand management, and FMCG interview prep.

name: Ananyo Roy
bio: Ananyo is the top-ranked HR mentor from XLRI Jamshedpur, voted #1 by 250+ students. At TAS — covers HR strategy, org design, people management, and behavioural interview coaching.

name: Ashutosh Gupta
bio: Ashutosh is the top-ranked Operations mentor from IIM Lucknow, voted #1 by 250+ students. At Gulf Oil — specialises in supply chain strategy, operations case interviews, and logistics.
